zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Champernowne於1396年出生在英國英格蘭戴文莫德波利時，她的父親Lord Richard II Champernoun52歲，母親Lady Katherine Daubeney32歲。她於1417年與Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1456年在英國戴文莫德波利享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Champernowne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Cambernon in Manche.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Champernowne was born in 1396, in Modbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord Richard II Champernoun, was 52 and her mother, Lady Katherine Daubeney, was 32. She married Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon in 1417, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1456, in Modbury, Devon, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Champernowne est née en 1396, à Modbury, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Richard II Champernoun, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Daubeney, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon en 1417, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1456, à Modbury, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Champernowneが1396年にイギリスイギリスデボンモドブリーで生まれた時，父Lord Richard II Champernounは52歳，母Lady Katherine Daubeneyは32歳であった。1417年にイギリスイギリスデボンでSheriff Robert Hill of Devonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1456年にイギリスデボンモドブリーで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Champernowne(이)가 1396년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 모드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Richard II Champernoun(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Katherine Daubeney(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1456년 영국 데폰 모드버이에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Champernowne родилась в 1396 г. в местности модбури, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord Richard II Champernoun было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Daubeney, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon в 1417 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1456 г. в местности модбури, девон, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.
